zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger Carminow於大約1240年出生在英國可瓦爾時，他的父親Roger Carminow32歲，母親Sarah Hornacote27歲。他和Joanna Dinham至少有9個兒子和4個女兒。他去世於大約1308年享年70歲，埋葬在英國可瓦爾馬根。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roger Carminow于大约1240年出生在英国可瓦爾时，他的父亲Roger Carminow32岁，母亲Sarah Hornacote27岁。他和Joanna Dinham至少有9个儿子和4个女儿。他去世于大约1308年享年70岁，埋葬在英国可瓦爾馬根。

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger Carminow was born about 1240, in Cornwall, England, his father, Roger Carminow, was 32 and his mother, Sarah Hornacote, was 27. He had at least 9 sons and 4 daughters with Joanna Dinham. He died about 1308, at the age of 70, and was buried in Mawgan, Cornwall, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger Carminow est né environ 1240, à Cornouailles, Angleterre, son père, Roger Carminow, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Sarah Hornacote, avait 27 ans. Il a eu au moins 9 fils et 4 filles avec Joanna Dinham. Il est décédé environ 1308, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterré à Mawgan, Cornouailles, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger Carminow um 1240 in Cornwall, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger Carminow 32 und seine Mutter Sarah Hornacote 27. Er hatte mit Joanna Dinham mindestens 9 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb um 1308 im Alter von 70 Jahren und wurde in Mawgan, Cornwall, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roger Carminow è nato il circa 1240 nel Cornwall, England, il suo padre, Roger Carminow, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Sarah Hornacote, aveva 27 anni. Lui avuto almeno 9 figli e 4 figlie con Joanna Dinham. Morì circa 1308, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolto a Mawgan, Cornwall, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger Carminowが約1240年にイギリスコルンワルで生まれた時，父Roger Carminowは32歳，母Sarah Hornacoteは27歳であった。彼はJoanna Dinhamとの間に少なくとも9人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼は約1308年に70歳で死去し，イギリスコルンワルマウガンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger Carminow(이)가 대략 1240년 영국 코른월에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger Carminow(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Sarah Hornacote(은)는 27세였다. 그는 Joanna Dinham(와)과 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1308년 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 코른월 마w건에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger Carminow nasceu aproximadamente 1240, em Cornwall, Inglaterra, seu pai, Roger Carminow, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Sarah Hornacote, tinha 27 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 9 filhos e 4 filhas com Joanna Dinham. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1308, com 70 anos, e foi sepultado em Mawgan, Cornwall, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger Carminow родился около 1240 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия, его отцу по имени Roger Carminow было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Sarah Hornacote, 27. У него было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 4 дочери от Joanna Dinham. Он умер около 1308 г. в возрасте 70 лет и был похоронен в местности мавган, корнвалл, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Roger Carminow nació aproximadamente 1240, en Cornwall, Inglaterra, su papá, Roger Carminow, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Sarah Hornacote, tenía 27 años. Tuvo por lo menos 9 hijos y 4 hijas con Joanna Dinham. Murió aproximadamente 1308, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultado en Mawgan, Cornwall, Inglaterra.
